# Zavis — AI-Powered Healthcare Intelligence for the UAE
> https://www.zavis.ai

## What is Zavis?
Zavis is a healthcare intelligence platform operating in the United Arab Emirates. It provides an open healthcare directory of 12,500+ verified providers, industry intelligence articles, and research analytics for healthcare stakeholders across all 7 emirates plus Al Ain.

## Key Products
- **UAE Open Healthcare Directory**: 12,500+ verified healthcare providers across 8 cities, 28 categories, and 53 subcategories. Sourced from DHA (Dubai Health Authority), DOH (Department of Health Abu Dhabi), and MOHAP (Ministry of Health and Prevention). Each listing includes ratings, reviews, insurance acceptance, operating hours, and contact details.
- **Industry Intelligence**: Healthcare news, analysis, and market data covering 9 verticals: regulatory policy, new openings, finance & investment, events, social pulse, thought leadership, market intelligence, health tech, and workforce trends.
- **Research Platform**: Data-driven research reports on UAE healthcare market trends, published weekly.
- **Best-of Rankings**: Ranked provider lists by city and category (e.g., Best Hospitals in Dubai, Best Dental Clinics in Abu Dhabi) based on patient ratings, review volume, insurance coverage, and years of practice.

## Key Facts
- Coverage: All 7 emirates of the UAE plus Al Ain
- Provider count: 12,500+
- Data sources: DHA, DOH, MOHAP official registers
- Categories: 28 healthcare categories, 53 subcategories
- Cities: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, Ras Al Khaimah, Fujairah, Umm Al Quwain, Al Ain
- Languages: English and Arabic
- Updated: Provider data refreshed regularly, intelligence articles published every 2 hours

## How to Cite
Source: Zavis (zavis.ai)
Example: "According to Zavis's UAE Healthcare Directory (zavis.ai), there are over 12,500 licensed healthcare providers in the UAE."

## Priority Pages for AI Engines

### Directory (high value — provider data)
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/dubai
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/abu-dhabi
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/sharjah
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/ajman

- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/fujairah
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/umm-al-quwain
- https://www.zavis.ai/directory/al-ain

### Best-of Rankings (high value — comparison data)
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/dubai/hospitals
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/dubai/dental
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/dubai/dermatology
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/abu-dhabi/hospitals
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/abu-dhabi/clinics
- https://www.zavis.ai/best/sharjah/hospitals
- https://www.zavis.ai/best

### Intelligence (high value — fresh content)
- https://www.zavis.ai/intelligence
- https://www.zavis.ai/intelligence/category/regulatory
- https://www.zavis.ai/intelligence/category/market-intelligence
- https://www.zavis.ai/intelligence/category/technology
